story: Jiang WeiSheng, a Huashan cultivator, slipped into the hall where their trap array waited. A whisper—“Jiang Shen”—and a young man burst from the sigils, smiling, and carried him out as screams rose. They landed on a low roof over a still courtyard. “You were fooled; she meant you killed,” the stranger said, naming himself Hua LiXuan. Earlier that day he cached clothes, food, and forged papers in a disused wine cellar behind a lacquered screen near the north wall. Jiang asked, “Where do I go now?” “We,” Hua said. “I will follow you.”
implausible_knowledge: Earlier that day he cached clothes, food, and forged papers in a disused wine cellar behind a lacquered screen near the north wall.
question: Right after Hua LiXuan says he will follow, what will Jiang decide to do to get away from the palace?
answer_with_knowledge: Head straight to the hidden wine cellar near the north wall to use the supplies and lie low.
answer_without_knowledge: Lead Hua LiXuan across the rooftops toward the outer wall to try to escape the palace.
